---
title: "Compliance Volume Replacement Concept Trade Study"
subtitle: "Replacement of the Foil Breather Bag and Outward-Only Check Valve"
author: "Opto-Mechanical Engineering Group"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
abstract: |
  The shipping failure mechanism analyzed in the companion specification
  document establishes that the present passive foil-bag and outward-only
  check-valve concept cannot guarantee nonnegative gauge pressure in the
  manifolded nitrogen system on the return leg. This document develops the
  engineering response: a mathematical model for the required compliance
  volume, three concept variants for the replacement device, a decision
  matrix, and a bench proof-of-concept plan.
keywords:
  - compliance volume
  - bellows
  - shipping qualification
  - nitrogen purge
  - optical contamination control
---

# Stub

This document is a placeholder. Detailed sections are built after the
companion `failure-mechanism.qmd` is approved. See `_state/shipping/manifest.yml`
for the planned section list.
